name: CSX Corporation
description: CSX Corporation is a leading supplier of rail-based freight transportation services, including traditional rail service and the transport of intermodal containers and trailers. Based in Jacksonville, Florida, the company operates a premier rail network spanning approximately 20,000 route miles across 26 states, the District of Columbia, and two Canadian provinces. CSX serves major population centers in the eastern United States and connects to more than 230 short-line railroads and over 70 ocean, river, and lake ports. The company plays a critical role in the North American supply chain by transporting a diverse range of industrial, agricultural, and energy products.

investment_theses.company_type: Logistics / Rail Transport for Eastern US Industry
